narrative:
Precinct Monroe (precinct in Muskingum County) has 251 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 41.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 34.7 percentage points.
